reviews.comment:
Suele estar muy concurrido, no obstante hay una excelente atención.
Pero la puntuación otorgada es dado a que en el minishopping está todo excesivamente caro, haciendo abuso del tránsito turístico.
Entre entrar al minishopping y que me apunten bajo amenaza es lo mismo.

(Translated by Google)
It's usually very crowded, but the service is excellent.
However, the low rating is due to the fact that everything in the mini-shopping center is excessively expensive, taking advantage of tourist traffic. Entering the mini-shopping center is like being threatened and having a ticket pointed at me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnbTl5NDdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hay 1 solaaa empleada en la confiteria y se hacen unas colas reeeee largas xa llevar 1 coca , desastreeeee
